handedness.Description: Indicates the dominant hand for this subject as determined by the Edinburgh Handedness Inventory (EHI).

meg1_to_meg2_interval.LongName: Time interval between MEG1 and MEG2 sessions
meg1_to_meg2_interval.Description: This interval indicates how much time passed between MEG sessions 1 and 2.

meg1_to_meg3_interval.LongName: Time interval between MEG1 and MEG3 sessions
meg1_to_meg3_interval.Description: This interval indicates how much time passed between MEG sessions 1 and 3.
